input: How many US Senators are there in total?

metadata.source: US Constitution, Article I, Section 3 (two senators per state, 50 states)

input: How many voting members serve in the US House of Representatives?

metadata.source: Reapportionment Act of 1929; cap codified at 2 USC § 2a
metadata.notes: Voting members only; six non-voting delegates (DC + 5 territories) bring the total to 441 if counted.

input: What is the total number of electoral college votes in a US presidential election?

metadata.source: US Constitution, Article II + 23rd Amendment (435 House + 100 Senate + 3 DC)

input: How many electoral votes are required to win the US presidency?
In what year was the 26th Amendment to the US Constitution ratified, lowering the voting age to 18?
In what year was the Voting Rights Act enacted into US federal law?

metadata.source: Voting Rights Act of 1965, signed August 6, 1965

input: In what year was the 19th Amendment to the US Constitution ratified, granting women the right to vote?
In what year was the first US presidential election held?

metadata.source: US presidential election of 1788–1789; George Washington took office April 30, 1789
metadata.notes: 1788 (when most balloting occurred) is also defensible; canonical truth is 1789 when the election concluded and the president took office.

input: What is the estimated US resident population as of mid-2024?

metadata.source: US Census Bureau, Vintage 2024 national population estimate (July 1, 2024): 334,914,895

input: How many votes were cast for president in the 2020 US general election (all candidates combined)?

metadata.source: Federal Election Commission, Federal Elections 2020: 158,429,631 votes for president

input: As of 2024, how many US states (not counting Washington DC) offer same-day voter registration on Election Day?

metadata.source: NCSL 'Same Day Voter Registration' tracker, accessed 2024
metadata.notes: Counts vary by source and definition (full Election Day SDR vs. early-vote-period only). NCSL's count for full SDR is around 22 states + DC in 2024.
